tower_28.voice: Approachable, friendly, conversational, expert-not-clinical (8.5/10 casual). Tagline energy: 'Good Clean Fun' / 'It's OK to be sensitive.' Avoid cure/heal/treat language. Frame as safe for sensitive/eczema-prone skin, never clinical or sterile. IG: 75-250 words, 1-3 emoji (✨💖☀️), relaxed CTA. TikTok: demo/creator-friend voice, <150 char caption. Email: benefit-led subject, 30-50 chars, 0-1 emoji.
compliance_notes: Use support, soothe, calm, and comfort language instead of cure or heal claims.
Do not imply the product changes skin structure or treats diagnosable conditions.

half_magic.voice: Bold, artistic, playful, irreverent, inclusive (9/10 casual). Sells experimentation not perfection — backstage-friend voice. Avoid flawless/corrective/anti-aging/clinical language. TikTok: fast, tutorial/trend style, <100 char captions. IG: hook first, high emoji density (✨💜🖤🌈💫⚡🪩) spaced throughout copy not just end, product names in ALL CAPS, intentional mix of lowercase and caps within caption. CTA like 'tag us'/'shop now'. Email: playful/curious subject, 25-45 chars, casual.
compliance_notes: Avoid medical, therapeutic, or guaranteed performance claims.
Make color payoff and creative expression the center of the message.
